CDN预热URL投递: 在提交CDN预热URL时触发，允许其他模块监听并处理预热URL。事件数据包含模块名、提供者、URL列表等信息。
CDN preheating URL delivery: Triggered when submitting CDN preheat URLs, allowing other modules to listen and process the preheat URLs. Event data includes module name, provider, URL list, etc.

CDN预热URL投递: 在清理CDN缓存时触发，允许其他模块监听并处理缓存清理操作。事件数据包含域名、清理模式等信息。
CDN preheating URL delivery: Triggered when clearing the CDN cache, allowing other modules to listen and process cache clearing operations. Event data includes domain name, clearing mode, etc.

CDN预热URL投递: 在推送CDN规则到服务商时触发，允许其他模块监听并参与规则推送。事件数据包含规则列表、域名等信息。
CDN preheating URL delivery: Triggered when pushing CDN rules to the service provider, allowing other modules to listen and participate in rule pushing. Event data includes rule list, domain, etc.

CDN预热URL投递: 获取CDN供应商列表时触发，允许其他模块补充或修改供应商列表数据。事件数据包含 providers 数组。
CDN preheating URL delivery: Triggered when fetching provider list; allows other modules to extend or modify providers. Data includes providers array.

CDN预热URL投递: 获取CDN账户列表时触发，允许其他模块补充或修改账户列表数据。事件数据包含 accounts 数组及 adapter 过滤条件。
CDN preheating URL delivery: Triggered when fetching account list; allows other modules to extend or modify accounts. Data includes accounts and adapter filter.
